title: 3D totem
description: This resourcepack will replace the standard 2d totem of undying an improved 3d version.
body:
3D totem resourcepack replaces the standard boring totem of undying with a more interesting and beautiful 3d variation

***Important*** - for the texturpack to work, you need an optifine or CIT
- optifine - download from the official website
- CIT - https://modrinth.com/mod/cit-resewn
